label: About
title: About Halo Badge Paper Field
short_blurb: A daily generated front page where the image is the interface.
body: Daily Frontpage is a daily generated interactive front page. Each edition starts from recent saved signals and source research, becomes a new image-led scene, and stays explorable in the archive. The image is the interface: visible marks, objects, and surfaces in the scene open the real sources that shaped the day.

This iteration began with 81 recent saved-signal files and 78 captured links, then narrowed the page to 9 source windows around @archivepilled: birthday card for my sister and @VGMaps: I own and run The Video Game Atlas mostly by myself for over 24 years, and it's amassed..., plus 7 more. A source image from pbs.twimg.com helped set the palette, contrast, edge behavior, and gesture. The scene became Halo Badge Paper Field: Material macro fashion plate, side-lit object slab: a pale portrait paper field sits slightly off-center on muted teal loop-pattern cloth. A circular halo trace above center and broad wing-like graphite gestures become the main internal architecture; a small cake-baseline aperture weights the lower third. After the image was made, a plate-reading pass mapped 9 visible regions and the mask audit tightened them against large pale lifted paper slab, right teal patterned border strip, and faint graphite halo ring.

typography.body_family: 'DFE Newsreader', Iowan Old Style, Georgia, serif
typography.rationale: Fraunces gives the title an organic, seed-label quality; Newsreader keeps the explanation calm and readable.
